unreleased_commits.author: JaredHatfield
unreleased_commits.message:
feat: prune stale state for removed mappings/sources and fix dot-source handling

- Prune state entries when a mapping or source is removed from config.yaml
- Add dot-source mapping support in pathEqualOrNested for "." roots
- Introduce nextKeys map to deduplicate state entries during planning
- Update docs to reflect automatic stale state pruning behavior
- Remove stale-state-resolution section from requirements (now implemented)
- Add comprehensive tests for prune, dry-run preservation, and dot-source flows
